text.p: Government, Resettlement ,
Secondary, school,
p.o box 169
Local , Government , Area,
The chairman
Local
Government Area,
Dear Sir,
A LETTER OF COMPLAINT
I I wish to write you this letter , to Tell you about , the poor state of roads in my Town.
There has always been series, of Accident on the road, claiming many lifes and properties.
This are some of the consequences of the poor state of roads in my town.
it will discourage petty traders who move from one place to another in The Cost of marketing or selling his or Her Goods.
The poor state of bad road will Discourage the smooth flow of business Transaction, these local Government Area in a state of handicap.
Poor road facilities also drive Away investors , who wish to invest in These local Government area.

Bad road will poison the mind of the sons and daughters of these local Government who lived abroad to come back home And invest, because of the poor state of Road, people who which to come back Home during an important 2 characters Events like festivals or during traditional ceremony will get discourage to come back home

poor transportation system we or know or have some definite impression That if the roads are bad, there is a certainity that the transport system will like wise be bad. The poor state of bad Road will make travelling discouraging.
We all know the importance of good road, because the road is bad
There will be an embargo to the Development of our local Government Area.
further more poor road discourage The development of Agriculture, it will Discourage the local farmers not to produce good crops Which are transportable And not carryable from one place to another
It also stands as an hindrance to The development of economy in our Local government area.
If therefore some of these point are Taking into consideration, I think it will be Begining of good things to come. 1 character
And the local government should come To our aids and listen to the voice of Masses.
Your's faithfully
